title: Refresh the stale lockfile before `cargo build`

hypothesis.statement: The recurring `cargo build` exit-code-101 failure follows an out-of-date lockfile, and refreshing it first removes the failure.
hypothesis.expected_result: Matching `cargo build` attempts succeed on the first try once the lockfile is refreshed, with no repeated exit-code-101 failures.
failure_cases: The lockfile can be intentionally pinned, so refreshing it may be unwanted.
The failure can be transient and unrelated to the lockfile.

exclusions: Do not refresh the lockfile when the repository pins dependencies deliberately.

intervention.instruction: Before running `cargo build`, check whether Cargo.lock is older than Cargo.toml. When it is, run `cargo update` first; otherwise leave the workflow unchanged.
